prompt_text: Open source or affordable internal tooling tools instead of Budibase
response:
# Open Source & Affordable Internal Tooling Alternatives

## **Self-Hosted & Free**

### **Lightweight/Minimal**
- **[Appsmith](https://appsmith.com/)** - Open source, drag-and-drop, self-hostable
- **[Retool](https://retool.com/)** - Self-hosted version available (paid), but very feature-rich
- **[NocoDB](https://nocodb.com/)** - Open source Airtable alternative, great for databases
- **[Directus](https://directus.io/)** - Headless CMS + data management, fully open source
- **[Supabase](https://supabase.com/)** - Firebase alternative, generous free tier, self-hostable
- **[Strapi](https://strapi.io/)** - Headless CMS with admin panel, open source

### **Code-First (More Control)**
- **[Wasp](https://wasp-lang.dev/)** - Full-stack framework, minimalist approach
- **[React-Admin](https://marmelab.com/react-admin/)** - Admin panels for REST/GraphQL APIs
- **[AdminJS](https://adminjs.co/)** - Auto-generated admin dashboards from databases

---

## **Affordable SaaS**

| Tool | Pricing | Best For |
|------|---------|----------|
| **[Airtable](https://airtable.com/)** | $10-20/user/mo | Database + views + automation |
| **[SmartSuite](https://www.smartsuite.com/)** | $65/mo team | Notion-like with workflows |
| **[Baserow](https://baserow.io/)** | $5-20/user/mo | Open source Airtable clone |
| **[Softr](https://www.softr.io/)** | $99/mo | No-code web apps from data |
| **[Bubble](https://bubble.io/)** | $25-115/mo | Full web app builder |

---

## **Quick Recommendation**

**If you want:**
- **Best open source → Appsmith or Retool (self-hosted)**
- **Cheapest managed → Airtable free tier or Baserow**
- **Full control + simplicity → NocoDB + custom frontend**
- **Modern DX → Supabase + Next.js**

What's your main use case? That'll help narrow it down.
